title: Web font demo output is blurry on device

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Fixing web font blur by forcing pixel-aligned render path: integer-positioned text in fixture + 64x64 viewport with device_scale_factor=1 and nearest sampling.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Acceptance note: user reported text visible but blurry on-device; targeting deterministic pixel-grid rendering.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Switched web_font_demo fixture from Google-hosted Tiny5 to local @font-face Tiny5-Regular.ttf for deterministic glyph output.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Working now: switch web-font demo to known-good Tiny5 render path and set color to Radix sand-5 for visual confirmation on device.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Updated demo_web_fonts to use tinytext_192 fixture (same path as font_showcase), default variant=single_a, font=tiny5, and text color default dark.sand5; uploaded to device for visual verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: User confirmed on device: Tiny5 render now correct with Radix sand-5 color.
